zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Stratton於大約1385年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可韋斯頓 隆維爾時，他的父親Walter de Stratton38歲，母親Cecily Walter34歲。他於1423年與Elizabeth Luttrell在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於從1469年11月10日到1469年12月9日在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Stratton于大约1385年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可韋斯頓 隆維爾时，他的父亲Walter de Stratton38岁，母亲Cecily Walter34岁。他于1423年与Elizabeth Luttrell在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于从1469年11月10日到1469年12月9日在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stratton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Stratton or Stretton, almost all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, Roman road’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. Stratton in Cornwall, which may also be a partial source of the surname, probably has as its first element Cornish stras ‘valley’.

English: variant of Sturton, a habitational name from Sturton le Steeple (Nottinghamshire), Great Sturton (Lincolnshire), Sturton by Stow (Lincolnshire), or possibly Sturton (Northumberland), all of which placenames share the same etymology and early spellings as 1 above.

Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘street, Roman road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Straiton
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, street’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Stratton .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Stratton was born about 1385, in Weston Longville, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter de Stratton, was 38 and his mother, Cecily Walter, was 34. He married Elizabeth Luttrell in 1423, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died from 10 November 1469 to 9 December 1469, in his hometown, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Elizabeth Luttrell en 1423, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé du 10 novembre 1469 au 9 décembre 1469, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: John de Stratton(이)가 대략 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 웨스턴 론그빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Stratton(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Walter(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1423년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Elizabeth Luttrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1469년 11월 10일부터 1469년 12월 9일까지 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.Stratton Kyrketon, Norfolk, England: лонг страттон ст мэри, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Stratton родился около 1385 г. в местности вестон лонгвилл, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter de Stratton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Walter, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Luttrell в 1423 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер с 10 ноября 1469 по 9 декабря 1469 в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.
